ogTitle: Wolgan Valley vs Wollangambe: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wolgan Valley and Wollangambe.
heading: Wolgan Valley vs Wollangambe — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wolgan Valley, New South Wales and Wollangambe, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wolgan Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Wollangambe (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wolgan Valley or Wollangambe safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wolgan Valley has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Wollangambe scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wolgan Valley scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Wollangambe scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wolgan Valley or Wollangambe?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wolgan Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
